Self-taught Junior Data Analyst based in Karachi, Pakistan. I built real-world analytics projects using Python, SQL, and Google Sheets — without a formal CS degree. I specialize in transforming messy raw data into clean, actionable business insights that drive decision-making.

My Work
Featured Projects
PROJECT 01
Superstore Sales Analysis
Python · Exploratory Data Analysis
9,994 Orders $2.3M Revenue 12.47% Margin
Analyzed real-world retail dataset uncovering Technology as top category ($836K), identified Furniture's low 2.49% margin, and discovered Nov-Dec peak sales periods. Built 10+ visualizations.
PythonPandasNumPyMatplotlibGoogle Colab

PROJECT 02
Superstore Sales Dashboard
Google Sheets · Dashboard
$2.3M Tracked Pivot Tables VLOOKUP
Built interactive sales dashboard tracking $2.3M revenue. Created Pivot Tables for multi-dimensional analysis, automated metrics with VLOOKUP and IF formulas, applied Conditional Formatting.
Google SheetsPivot TablesVLOOKUPCharts
View on GitHub →
PROJECT 03
SQL Sales Analysis
SQL · Business Intelligence
Rs. 427,000 Electronics 83% Lahore #1
Used advanced SQL queries with JOINs, Subqueries, GROUP BY, HAVING, CASE WHEN to analyze retail sales. Identified Lahore as top city (Rs. 175K) and January as peak month.
SQLMySQLDB BrowserGitHub
View on GitHub →
PROJECT 04
Customer Segmentation System
Python · Machine Learning
K-Means Elbow Method ML Model
Built unsupervised ML model to segment customers by purchasing behavior. Applied Elbow Method for optimal clusters, performed preprocessing and encoding, visualized high-value segments.
